title: Acceptance regression eval
description: Synthetic no-network checks for acceptance compiler contracts and fixtures.

cases.title: Acceptance and task packet contracts remain discoverable

commands.run: node -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; for (const file of ['packages/core/src/planning.mjs','schemas/task-packet.contract.json','schemas/build-handoff.contract.json']) { if (!fs.existsSync(file)) throw new Error(file + ' missing'); } console.log('acceptance-regression fixtures ok')"
